---
title: "Edward Chick"
description: "A data analyst of 9 years' experience in the NHS, specialising in using Python for analysis, machine learning modelling and automation. Currently looking for a career change, but one where I still get to make the most of my analytical expertise."
format: html
about:
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/edward-chick-8ba753372
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/rusty-cogburn
        - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
          url: mailto:edward.chick@pm.me
---

## Career Bio

## Projects & Blog

This is my first foray into making a portfolio website, and I hope to start filling it with personal data analysis / data science projects, as well as reflections on technology and beyond.

Head to my [Projects](/projects_landing.qmd) and [Blog](/blog_landing.qmd) pages to see what I have been working on.

## Personal
